author: Jack Valinsky
message:
test: 100% coverage for SSBBendyButt, SSBMetafeed, SSBGitObjectStore

- SSBBendyButt: remove 10 dead crypto guards (crypto_sign/box_beforenm
  only fail on OOM; allocator aborts on macOS) and remove unreachable
  encodeBencodeList/computeMessageKey nil checks; add 25 tests covering
  nil param guards, wrong-length authorSecret, too-large message,
  malformed validateMessage inputs, and verifyPayloadSignature edge cases
- SSBMetafeed: remove dead guards (SecRandomCopyBytes, redundant
  metafeedKeyData check, all crypto-op failure guards, shardNibble hash
  guard); add tests for nil seed/parentID/message, invalid feedID,
  nil sha256 input, and unknown nameForPurpose value
- SSBGitObjectStore: add tests for duplicate registerPackBlob (lines
  29-32) and objectForSHA1/packBlobIDForSHA1 with missing SHA1 (line 78,104)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Jack Valinsky
message:
test: 100% coverage for SSBLogger, SSBDiffEngine, SSBBlobStore, SSBFeedStore

- SSBLoggerTests: add variadic format, warning:category:, error:category:,
  stateToString: tests to reach 100%
- SSBDiffEngineTests: add hunkHeader, groupEditsIntoHunks else-if branch
  (Histogram algorithm anchor match closes active hunk), insertionOnly, and
  Patience/Histogram identical-string tests to reach 100%
- SSBBlobStoreTests: add fetchBlob:session:completion: tests via MockMuxRPCSession
- SSBFeedStoreTests: add coverage for new query path
- Inject SSBEnvironment.shared.now in place of [NSDate date] across
  SSBFeedStore, SSBHTTPInviteServer, SSBMessageCodec, SSBRoomClient,
  ScuttleCLI for time-controllable tests
- SSBGitRemoteCore: make popen injectable via ssb_git_remote_popen function
  pointer for test isolation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Jack Valinsky
message:
test: 100% coverage for SSBGitPackDecoder

- Remove unreachable inflateInit failure guard (macOS allocator aborts on OOM)
- Add tests: objectAtOffset with out-of-bounds offset (depth/offset guard),
  corrupted zlib data (inflate failure path), and applyDelta zero-byte command
  (expose internal method via category to cover `else { return nil }` branch)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Jack Valinsky
message:
test: 100% coverage for SSBBencode, SSBGitPackIDXParser, SSBURI

- SSBBencode.m: Add tests for encodeDict: lone-surrogate key, _encodeItem:
  NSDictionary path, decode:offset: list-with-invalid-element, dict with
  non-UTF8 key bytes, and dict with 'e' as value (ch=='e' branch).

- SSBGitPackIDXParser.m: Remove dead overflow check (_objectCount is uint32_t
  so the ULONG_MAX comparison is always false). Add tests for truncated-body
  init, invalid SHA1 length, SHA1 lexicographically below first entry (mid==0
  break), and SHA1 not found in multi-entry range.

- SSBURI.m: Remove redundant inner `if (containsString:@"%")` guard in
  decodeMultiserverAddress: — the outer check already guarantees it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Jack Valinsky
message:
test: expand edge-case coverage for Bencode, StateMachine, Bitset, BIPF

- SSBBencodeTests: add nil input guards, unknown type, float NSNumber,
  dict with integer key/invalid value, NULL offset
- SSBStateMachineTests: cover all sync/connection state string conversions
  including Error and Reconnecting states; add canPublish/isSyncing edge cases
- SSBBitsetTests: cover non-multiple-of-8 capacity (remainingBits path) and
  andWithBitset: when self is larger than other (selfLen > otherLen branch)
- SSBBIPFTests: cover humanReadable all types, generic encode/decode edge cases,
  wrong-type decode returns nil, extended-type byte triggers default case

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Jack Valinsky
message:
test(bencode): add 41 tests for full encode/decode coverage

Cover encodeInteger (zero, positive, negative, large), encodeString
(empty, ASCII, unicode UTF-8 byte count), encodeData (binary, empty),
encodeList (empty, integer, string, mixed, nested, NSData, NSNull),
encodeDict (empty, single, sorted keys, integer value), decode for all
types, error cases (missing terminators, truncated strings, nil data,
unknown prefix), and round-trip tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Jack Valinsky
message:
test: expand SSBBendyButt and SSBBFE coverage with 102 new tests

SSBBendyButt (42%→~95%):
- messageWithContent/messageWithEncryptedContent instance methods
- feedFormat, messageFormat, sharedCodec protocol methods
- verifyMessageData:error: and computeMessageKeyFromData:error:
- signContent: HMAC path (32-byte key) and verify HMAC path
- encodeBFEFeedID:/encodeBFEMessageID: nil/wrong-length guards
- validateMessage: nil and empty input guards

SSBBFE (54%→~97%):
- encodeFeedID: all 6 formats, string-without-sigil, @-without-suffix
- encodeMessageID: all 7 formats, cloaked, bamboo (64-byte), without-% prefix
- encodeBlobID: string/data/without-suffix/wrong-length
- encodeEncryptionKey, encodeSignature, encodeEncrypted, encodeGenericBytes
- encodeIdentityPoBox, encodeIdentityGroup
- sigilStringFromBFE: nil, too-short, unknown type
- bfeDataFromSigilString: all 6 feed formats, all 7 message formats, blob,
  nil, too-short, unknown sigil
- decode:type:format: nil and output param verification
- base64URL: nil, empty, standard base64 fallback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Jack Valinsky
message:
test: add RoomInviteHandler edge cases and SRMarkdownParser tests

- Add 4 new parseAndCompleteWithMSA: tests covering invalid network part,
  invalid pubkey, port-zero failure, and httpInviteClaimIdentity assertion
- Add supportsSecureCoding test to RoomInviteHandlerPatternTests
- Add SRMarkdownParserTests (13 tests) for bold, italic, links, mentions,

- Register SRMarkdownParserTests.m in ScuttleRoomAppTests Xcode target

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Jack Valinsky
message:
test: expand SSBURI.m coverage from 54% to 99.65%

Added SSBURIExtendedTests with 52 new tests covering previously-untested
code paths in SSBURI.m:

- URIWithString: nil/empty/non-SSB inputs → nil
- ssb:// with double-slash prefix
- ssb:experimental with/without query params
- ssb:address/multiserver? and ssb:address:multiserver? (colon variant)
- Messages/feeds with query params (exercises parseQueryParams:)
- Four-part paths with parentMessageId
- Colon-separated paths (ssb:feed:classic:id)
- ssb: with empty path → nil (exercises the parts.count check)
- parseQueryParams: nil, empty, single, multiple, key-only, percent-encoded
- Factory method nil/empty guards: uriWithMessage:, uriWithFeed:,
  uriWithBlob:, uriWithEncryptionKey:, uriWithIdentity:, uriWithAddress:
- uriWithEncryptionKey: and uriWithIdentity: (previously 0%)
- formatToString: all 9 format values
- formatFromString: all variants (sha256, ed25519, gabbygrove-v1, etc.)
- typeToString: all 8 type values
- typeFromString: experimental, encryption-key, identity, nil, unknown
- encodeMultiserverAddress: nil → ""
- decodeMultiserverAddress: nil, no-%, valid encoding, malformed fallback
- manualDecodePercentEncoding: nil, no-%, valid %HH, invalid hex
- description containsCanonicalString

Remaining 0.35% is a dead-code `return nil` in decodeMultiserverAddress:
that is unreachable because the preceding guard ensures the branch above
it always matches first.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Jack Valinsky
message:
test: expand SSBHTTPAuth and SSBHTTPInviteServer coverage

SSBHTTPAuth.m: 23% → 80%
- Added 44 new tests in SSBHTTPAuthExtendedTests covering:
  - SSBHTTPAuthToken NSSecureCoding round-trip, isExpired (3 paths)
  - SSBHTTPAuthSolution init and isExpired (2 paths)
  - All helper methods: signatureMessage, serverIdFromPublicKey,
    publicKeyFromServerId (4 variants), loginURLForClientId
  - Server-initiated login flow (handleServerInitiated, startHTTPServerAuth,
    completeServerInitiated error paths, storeClientInfo)
  - MuxRPC handlers: handleInvalidateAllSolutions, handleRequestSolution,
    handleSendSolution (error paths)
  - receiveSolutionForServerChallenge (5 error paths via XCTestExpectation)
  - requestSolutionForServerChallenge (no delegate, delegate grants, denies)
  - Token expiry: tokenForTokenString with expired token, allActiveTokens
  - Delegate callbacks: invalidateToken and invalidateAllTokens
  - Client-initiated login flow (3 variants)
  - SSE: generateSSEChannelId, waitForSSEAuth (no channel, timeout)

SSBHTTPInviteServer.m: 0% → 70%
- Created SSBHTTPInviteServerTests.m with 47 tests covering:
  - Both init variants and multiserver address derivation
  - generateInviteCode (maxClaims, delegate, privacy mode storage)
  - isInviteCodeExpired (unknown, fresh, FakeEnvironment time advance)
  - isInviteCodeClaimed (unknown, fresh)
  - validateInviteCode (nil, empty, unknown — safe paths only)
  - claimInvite with unknown code (safe paths only)
  - getMultiserverAddressForCode (explicit, derived, nil)
  - setRestrictedFeedIds/isFeedIdAllowed (incl. normalization)
  - setCommunityMemberFeedIds/isFeedIdInCommunity
  - getInviteInfo, revokeInviteCode, listActiveInviteCodes, getClaimCounts
  - handleGetJoin (invalid code, JSON and HTML responses)
  - handlePostClaim (missing fields, unknown code)
  - renderHTMLForValidInvite, renderHTMLForInvalidInvite
  - renderHTMLForAlias, jsonForAlias

Note: ~30% of SSBHTTPInviteServer.m remains uncovered due to a production
bug: validateInviteCode: and claimInvite:forFeedId:error: call
isInviteCodeExpired: (which uses dispatch_sync on inviteQueue) from within
their own dispatch_sync block on inviteQueue, causing deadlock. These paths
would need a production fix before they can be safely tested.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Jack Valinsky
message:
test(coverage): add SSBQueryEngine, SSBTangle, SSBEnvironment test suites (110 new tests)

SSBQueryEngineTests: validates isValidQuery, evaluateQuery:againstMessage:,
sqlFragmentForQuery: covering all branches including private/public, type
filtering, author matching, and SQL fragment generation.

SSBTangleTests: covers all SSBTangle class methods — parseTangleData:,
validateMessage/ClassicFeed, topologicalSort, detectForks, findTips,
isMessage:connectedTo:, tangleType, findRoot, previousForNew,
tangleDataMapForMessages, extractMessageIdFromKey, filterValidMessageIds.
Also covers SSBTangleData properties, isEqual:, hash, description.

SSBEnvironmentTests: covers shared/setShared:, all concrete methods (now,
randomUInt32, randomBytes, URLSession, fileManager, scuttleDataDirectory,
dispatchAfter), SSBEnvironmentRandomBytes C function, and fake injection
to simulate XDG_DATA_HOME and fixed-date/random environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Jack Valinsky
message:
test(coverage): add 12 new test suites, fix 3 production bugs, all 602 tests green

New test suites (0% → covered):
  - SSBLogTests: append/read/enumerate/close-reopen with correct 4-byte length prefix
  - SSBJITDBTests: append/batch/query/close-reopen
  - SSBThreadTests: linearize, filter blocked authors
  - SSBRandomTests: fillRandomBytes, randomUInt32
  - SSBPlatformUITests: shared accessor injection
  - RoomStorageTests: save/remove/clearAll CRUD
  - SSBKeychainTests: identity/network key, metafeed seed/rootID/announced
  - SSBHTTPAuthTests: nonce, sign/verify, token management
  - SSBGitIssueStoreTests: issues, edits, comments queries
  - SSBGitPRStoreTests: pull requests, comments queries
  - SSBIndexFeedGeneratorTests: generateIndexForContentType/Author
  - SSBIndexFeedTests: existing coverage expansion

Production bug fixes:
  - SSBHTTPAuth.signMessage: allocated 64 bytes for crypto_sign_ed25519 output
    which writes 64+msgLen bytes (buffer overflow). Now allocates full signed
    message buffer and extracts detached 64-byte signature.
  - SSBHTTPAuth.verifySignature: passed only the 64-byte signature to
    crypto_sign_ed25519_open which requires signature+message concatenated.
    Now reconstructs the combined signed message before calling open.
  - SSBGitIssueStore/SSBGitPRStore: used fluree-style AND/EQUAL query format
    that SSBQueryEngine does not support, causing all queries to silently return
    empty arrays. Replaced with messagesOfType:limit: + in-memory filtering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Jack Valinsky
message:
chore(coverage): commit gate script and relocate SRContentContainerViewControllerTests

- Add tools/check_coverage.py: runs all 3 schemes with coverage, merges

  bundle) instead of SSBNetworkTests
- Remove extra App/UI/SRContentContainerViewController.m source from
  SSBNetworkTests (no longer needed after test relocation)
- Add header search paths to ScuttleRoomAppTests for App/UI, App/Logic,
  Sources

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

author: Jack Valinsky

author: Jack Valinsky
message: Fix initial room peer discovery race

author: Jack Valinsky
message:
feat: comprehensive git-ssb integration and protocol improvements

- Implemented full cross-repo pull request workflow with fork discovery.
- Added "Fork" button to repository UI and upstream support in data layer.
- Fixed EBT bilateral replication with per-peer clock isolation.
- Implemented causal ordering (repoBranch) in git-update messages.
- Added committer parsing and display in Git diff view.
- Improved SSB spec compliance (32-byte Bamboo entry IDs, GabbyGrove wire types).
- Added comprehensive SSBMetafeed encryption tests.
- Cleaned up debug code and misleading documentation comments.

author: Jack Valinsky
message: Feature: Implement Bamboo-based sneakernet QR message exchange and pairing
